package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_data_structure_choice_linked_list_for_cache_iteration: Layer: Data structure choice. Flag container/list use in cache iteration paths where slices or maps would improve locality.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule520NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario520Negative(records []Rule520NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
